description: I should be able to configure on a per project level the Max agents but the agent configuration that's directly underneath the board of actions should be for all projects So what I would do is I would increment it by one it would increment all projects by one so if I have 5 projects and I increment it then my total agents would go up by 5 for everyone
title: Add per-project max agents configuration with global increment

descriptionHistory.description: I should be able to configure on a per project level the Max agents but the agent configuration that's directly underneath the board of actions should be for all projects So what I would do is I would increment it by one it would increment all projects by one so if I have 5 projects and I increment it then my total agents would go up by 5 for everyone
